info.title: Calseta
info.description: SOC data platform for security agent consumption

post.description:
Programmatic alert ingest — skips webhook signature verification.

Accepts {"source_name": "sentinel", "payload": {...}}.
The payload must pass the source plugin's validate_payload() check.

get.description: Return all agent findings for an alert, ordered by posted_at.

post.description:
Re-trigger the enrichment pipeline for an alert.

Queues the enrich_alert task which re-runs the full 3-pass indicator
extraction + enrichment pipeline. Safe to call multiple times (idempotent).

get.description:
Return all applicable context documents for an alert.

Global documents appear first (sorted by document_type), followed by
targeted documents that match the alert's fields (also sorted by document_type).

Return all indicators linked to an alert.

Each indicator includes enrichment results keyed by provider with the raw
response excluded — only the extracted sub-object, success flag, and
enriched_at timestamp are returned.

post.description:
Add one or more indicators to an alert.

Each indicator is upserted globally (idempotent on type+value) and linked
to the alert. If ``enrich=true`` (default), an enrichment task is queued.

get.description:
Return the alert-indicator relationship graph.

Includes the current alert, its indicators, and for each indicator
the other alerts it appears in (capped by sibling_limit).

post.description:
Manually re-dispatch an alert to all matching registered agents.

Evaluates trigger criteria against the alert (same logic as post-enrichment
dispatch) and enqueues a dispatch_agent_webhooks task. Returns 202 with the
count and names of agents that will receive the webhook.

Dispatch an alert to a specific registered agent.

Bypasses trigger matching — sends the full enriched alert payload to
the specified agent regardless of its trigger criteria. Useful for
manual investigation or re-running an agent against a specific alert.

parameters.name: agent_uuid

schema.description: UUID of the agent to dispatch to
schema.title: Agent Uuid

parameters.description: UUID of the agent to dispatch to

post.description:
Receive a webhook from a configured alert source.

Verifies the webhook signature, validates the payload structure,
and enqueues the enrichment pipeline. Returns 202 immediately.

Allowed sources check: if the API key has `allowed_sources` set,
the requested source_name must be in that list.

get.description: Return hardcoded Pass 1 extraction fields from all registered sources.

Return a single indicator with full enrichment data including raw
provider responses. Used for the indicator detail sheet drill-down.

patch.description:
Update an indicator's malice verdict.

Send `{"malice": "Malicious"}` to set an analyst override.
Send `{"malice": null}` to reset to the enrichment-computed value.

get.description: Per-detection-rule effectiveness metrics (FP/TP rate, volume, trends).

post.description:
Synchronously enrich an indicator against all configured providers.

Results are returned cache-first. Each provider entry in the response
includes `cache_hit: true` when the result was served from cache rather
than a live API call.

get.description:
Return all registered enrichment providers with their configuration status.

`is_configured` is `true` when the provider's API key or credentials are
set in the environment. No secrets are included in the response.

post.description:
Create a context document.

Accepts either:
- `Content-Type: application/json` with body including `content` field
- `Content-Type: multipart/form-data` with `file` upload and other metadata as form fields

Enqueue a workflow for execution. Returns 202 Accepted immediately.

The trigger source is derived from the API key's `key_type` field —
agent keys always trigger as "agent", human keys as "human". This
cannot be overridden by the request body.

Approval gate (based on workflow.approval_mode):
- If approval_mode="always": all triggers go through approval gate.
- If approval_mode="agent_only": only agent triggers require approval.
- If approval_mode="never": no approval required, immediate execution.

When the approval gate fires, creates an approval request, enqueues a
notification, and returns:
  {"status": "pending_approval", "approval_request_uuid": "...", "expires_at": "..."}

When key_type="agent", both `reason` and `confidence` are required.

Generate workflow Python code from a natural language description.

Uses the configured LLM (Anthropic Claude) to produce a runnable
workflow. Returns the generated code for review; does not save automatically.
Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to be configured.

Execute a workflow in a sandboxed test environment.

All outbound HTTP from ctx.http is intercepted — no real external calls.
Integration clients (Okta, Entra) are replaced with mock versions that
record calls without executing them. Returns the WorkflowResult and
captured log output.

get.description: List saved code versions for a workflow, newest first.
List workflow runs across all workflows. Filterable by status and workflow_uuid.
List workflow approval requests. Filterable by status and workflow_uuid.

post.description:
Approve a pending workflow approval request.

Enqueues execute_approved_workflow_task so the workflow runs asynchronously.
Returns 409 if the request has expired or is already in a terminal state.

Reject a pending workflow approval request.

No execution is enqueued. Returns 409 if the request has expired or is
already in a terminal state.

get.description:
Render a browser-based approval page for the given approval request.

Auth: the `token` query parameter is the decide_token generated at approval
creation time. No API key required.

post.description:
Process an approval decision submitted from the browser approval page.

Auth: the `token` form field is the decide_token. No API key required.

Receive Slack interactive button payloads.

Validates the Slack signature, extracts the approval decision from the
action_id, and calls process_approval_decision(). Returns 200 immediately
(Slack requires < 3 seconds).

Note: raw body is read first so that body bytes are cached before form
parsing — this is required for correct HMAC signature validation against
the raw request body.

Teams interactive callback stub.

Teams incoming webhooks do not support interactive button callbacks
(that requires Azure Bot Framework, which is out of scope for v1).

Approvers should use the REST API endpoints or the browser approval page:
  POST /v1/workflow-approvals/{uuid}/approve or /reject
  GET  /v1/approvals/{uuid}/decide?token=...

schema.title: Response Teams Callback V1 Approvals Callback Teams Post

get.description:
Compact SOC health snapshot — always last 30 days.
No time window parameters — window is fixed per PRD.
Optimized for agent context injection (low token cost).
Return the system-level approval notifier defaults from env config.

schema.title: Response Get Approval Defaults V1 Settings Approval Defaults Get

allowed_sources.title: Allowed Sources
allowed_sources.description: Restrict ingestion to these source names (null = unrestricted)

key.title: Key
key.description: Full API key — store securely, never shown again

APIKeyCreated.title: APIKeyCreated
APIKeyCreated.description: Returned only by POST /v1/api-keys. Contains the full plain-text key (shown once).

APIKeyResponse.title: APIKeyResponse
APIKeyResponse.description: All endpoints other than creation — full key is never included.

ActivityEventResponse.title: ActivityEventResponse
ActivityEventResponse.description: Activity event as returned by GET /v1/alerts/{uuid}/activity.

ActivityEventType.title: ActivityEventType
ActivityEventType.description:
All activity event types. Shape of the `references` JSONB field
is fixed per event type — see PRD Section 8.

AlertCloseClassification.title: AlertCloseClassification
AlertCloseClassification.description:
Required when status transitions to Closed. Used for FP rate metrics and detection quality.
Any value starting with 'False Positive' counts toward the false_positive_rate metric.

AlertPatch.title: AlertPatch
AlertPatch.description:
Patch request for updating an alert — PATCH /v1/alerts/{uuid}.
All fields optional. If status=Closed, close_classification is required.

AlertRelationshipGraph.title: AlertRelationshipGraph
AlertRelationshipGraph.description: Complete graph data returned by the relationship-graph endpoint.

AlertResponse.title: AlertResponse
AlertResponse.description: Full alert response — returned by GET /v1/alerts/{uuid}.

AlertSeverity.title: AlertSeverity
AlertSeverity.description:
Alert severity levels. Stored as TEXT with Pydantic validation.
Source plugins are responsible for mapping source-specific severity values to this enum.

AlertStatus.title: AlertStatus
AlertStatus.description:
Alert investigation lifecycle status. Stored as TEXT with Pydantic validation.
Do NOT use a Postgres ENUM type — TEXT with app-level validation is easier to migrate.

Transition flow:
    Open → Triaging / Escalated → Closed

AlertSummary.title: AlertSummary
AlertSummary.description: Compact alert for list views — GET /v1/alerts.

ContextDocumentResponse.title: ContextDocumentResponse
ContextDocumentResponse.description: Full response — includes content and targeting_rules.

ContextDocumentSummary.title: ContextDocumentSummary
ContextDocumentSummary.description: List response — omits content to save tokens.

EnrichedIndicator.title: EnrichedIndicator
EnrichedIndicator.description:
Full indicator as returned to API callers and MCP clients.
Includes enrichment results and alert association metadata.

EnrichmentFieldExtractionBulkCreate.title: EnrichmentFieldExtractionBulkCreate
EnrichmentFieldExtractionBulkCreate.description: Request body for bulk-creating enrichment field extractions.

indicator_type.title: Indicator Type
indicator_type.description: Indicator type: ip, domain, hash_md5, hash_sha1, hash_sha256, url, email, account

source_path.title: Source Path
source_path.description: Dot-notation path into the raw enrichment response

target_key.title: Target Key
target_key.description: Key in the extracted dict surfaced to agents

value_type.title: Value Type
value_type.description: One of: string, int, float, bool, list, dict, any

EnrichmentFieldExtractionCreate.title: EnrichmentFieldExtractionCreate
EnrichmentFieldExtractionCreate.description: Request body for creating an enrichment field extraction.

EnrichmentFieldExtractionResponse.title: EnrichmentFieldExtractionResponse
EnrichmentFieldExtractionResponse.description: Response schema for enrichment field extraction endpoints.

EnrichmentProviderResponse.title: EnrichmentProviderResponse
EnrichmentProviderResponse.description: Response schema for enrichment provider endpoints.

EnrichmentProviderTestResponse.title: EnrichmentProviderTestResponse
EnrichmentProviderTestResponse.description: Response body for the test endpoint.

FindingResponse.title: FindingResponse
FindingResponse.description: Response from POST /v1/alerts/{uuid}/findings and items in GET list.

GraphAlertNode.title: GraphAlertNode
GraphAlertNode.description: Compact alert node for the relationship graph.

GraphIndicatorNode.title: GraphIndicatorNode
GraphIndicatorNode.description: Indicator node with sibling alerts for the relationship graph.

HttpStepDebug.title: HttpStepDebug
HttpStepDebug.description: Per-step HTTP request/response debug info for test results.

IndicatorAddItem.title: IndicatorAddItem
IndicatorAddItem.description: Single indicator to add to an alert.

IndicatorDetailResponse.title: IndicatorDetailResponse
IndicatorDetailResponse.description: Indicator with full enrichment data including raw provider responses.

source_name.title: Source Name
source_name.description: Restrict to a specific alert source (null = applies to all sources)

indicator_type.title: Indicator Type
indicator_type.description: Indicator type: ip, domain, hash_md5, hash_sha1, hash_sha256, url, email, account

extraction_target.title: Extraction Target
extraction_target.description: 'normalized' (against CalsetaAlert fields) or 'raw_payload' (against source raw data)

IndicatorPatch.title: IndicatorPatch
IndicatorPatch.description: Patch request for updating an indicator — PATCH /v1/indicators/{uuid}.

MaliceLevel.title: MaliceLevel
MaliceLevel.description: Indicator malice verdict — shared validation enum.

OnDemandEnrichmentRequest.title: OnDemandEnrichmentRequest
OnDemandEnrichmentRequest.description:
Request body for POST /v1/enrichments.

Accepts either {type, value} or {indicator_type, indicator_value}.

OnDemandEnrichmentResult.title: OnDemandEnrichmentResult
OnDemandEnrichmentResult.description: Per-provider result in the on-demand enrichment response.

WorkflowApprovalRequestResponse.title: WorkflowApprovalRequestResponse
WorkflowApprovalRequestResponse.description: Full approval request state — used by GET /v1/workflow-approvals/{uuid}.

WorkflowExecuteAgentRequest.title: WorkflowExecuteAgentRequest
WorkflowExecuteAgentRequest.description:
Request body for POST /v1/workflows/{uuid}/execute.

The trigger source is NOT a request field — it is derived server-side
from the API key's ``key_type`` (``human`` or ``agent``). Agent keys
must also provide ``reason`` and ``confidence`` for the approval gate.

WorkflowResponse.title: WorkflowResponse
WorkflowResponse.description: Full response — includes code and approval config.

WorkflowSummary.title: WorkflowSummary
WorkflowSummary.description: List response — omits code to save tokens.

app__schemas__alert__EnrichmentStatus.title: EnrichmentStatus
app__schemas__alert__EnrichmentStatus.description:
System-managed enrichment pipeline status. Stored as TEXT.
Set automatically by the enrichment pipeline — not user-editable.

Transition flow:
    Pending → Enriched | Failed
